    devel/woff2: Improve port and import patches

    - Import Coverity Scan patch from Fedora
    - Disable RPATH
    - Backport upstream commit 3831354113db8803fb1f5ba196cf0bbb537578dd
    - Add USES= pathfix and pkgconfig
